entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Vagaries in climate that necessitate the development of improved crop varieties to ensure food security

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed with multiple superior traits for better nutritional quality and yield

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value and quality of the crop

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A novel approach that predicts an individual's breeding value using a large number of markers spread throughout the complete genome

entities.name: BREEDING VALUE
entities.description: The genetic value of an individual as a parent, predicted using genomic data

entities.name: MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify locations on a chromosome and estimate breeding values

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in an organism

entities.name: TRAINING PHASE
entities.description: The first phase of genomic selection where marker and phenotypic effects of a population are utilized

entities.name: BREEDING PHASE
entities.description: The second phase of genomic selection where breeding values are estimated from marker data of the breeding population

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A traditional selection method based on specific markers, which genomic selection outperforms in terms of genetic gain

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average genetic merit of a population over time

entities.name: BREEDER'S EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical formula used to estimate genetic gain

entities.name: MARKER DENSITY
entities.description: The number of markers per unit length of the genome, affecting genetic gain

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technologies used to generate high-throughput genotypic data

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Platforms used to generate large amounts of phenotypic data

entities.name: PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used to combine genotypic and phenotypic data to predict breeding values

entities.name: GBLUP
entities.description: Genomic Best Linear Unbiased Prediction, a statistical tool for genomic prediction

entities.name: RRBLUP
entities.description: Ridge Regression Best Linear Unbiased Prediction, a statistical tool for genomic prediction

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major crop where genomic selection has been successfully employed to develop improved varieties

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A major crop where genomic selection has been successfully employed to develop improved varieties

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A major crop where genomic selection has been successfully employed to develop improved varieties
